prompt: Set up admin on a fresh Ubuntu machine — I want to use uv for Python and pnpm for Node

assertions.name: detects-no-profile
assertions.description: Recognizes that no profile exists and setup is needed

assertions.name: runs-tui-interview
assertions.description: Asks the TUI interview questions (storage location, preferences, inventory scan)

assertions.name: passes-uv-pnpm
assertions.description: Passes uv as Python manager and pnpm as Node manager to setup

assertions.name: correct-script-call
assertions.description: Uses new-admin-profile.sh with correct flags (--py-mgr, --node-mgr, etc.)

assertions.name: verifies-after-setup
assertions.description: Re-runs test-admin-profile.sh to verify profile was created
